cards.name: Blue Cash Everyday Card from American Express
cards.headline: $200 statement credit after qualifying spend
cards.description: No-annual-fee cash back card with U.S. supermarket, gas station, and online retail bonus categories.
cards.longDescription: Blue Cash Everyday has no annual fee and elevated cash back for common household spending categories.
pros: Bonus cash back on U.S. supermarkets, U.S. gas stations, and U.S. online retail purchases
cons: Foreign transaction fee
Category caps apply to several bonus categories

rewards.notes: U.S. supermarkets on up to $6,000 per year in purchases, then 1%.
U.S. gas stations on up to $6,000 per year in purchases, then 1%.
U.S. online retail purchases on up to $6,000 per year in purchases, then 1%.

signUpBonuses.displayDescription: Earn $200 back after you spend $2,000 in purchases on your new Card in your first 6 months. You will receive the $200 back in the form of a statement credit.

benefits.name: $84 Disney Bundle Credit
benefits.description: Up to $7 back each month after spending at least the required amount on an eligible Disney Bundle subscription.
benefits.activationMethod: Enroll and pay for an eligible Disney Bundle subscription with the card.
benefits.finePrint: Enrollment required. Monthly threshold and eligible subscription terms apply.

benefits.name: Purchase Protection
benefits.description: Can help protect eligible purchases against accidental damage, theft, or loss for a limited period after purchase.
benefits.activationMethod: Use the card for eligible purchases and file a claim when needed.
benefits.finePrint: Coverage limits, exclusions, and terms apply.

benefits.name: Extended Warranty
benefits.description: Can extend the original manufacturer's warranty on eligible purchases.
benefits.activationMethod: Use the card for eligible purchases and retain supporting documentation.
benefits.finePrint: Coverage limits, exclusions, and terms apply.

benefits.name: Return Protection
benefits.description: Can help when an eligible merchant will not take back a qualifying purchase within the stated time window.
benefits.activationMethod: Use the card for eligible purchases and submit a qualifying claim.
benefits.finePrint: Coverage limits, exclusions, and terms apply.

benefits.name: Car Rental Loss and Damage Insurance
benefits.description: Coverage for eligible rental car damage or theft when the rental is reserved and paid for with the card.
benefits.activationMethod: Reserve and pay for the full rental with the card and decline the rental company's collision damage waiver.
benefits.finePrint: Coverage type, limits, exclusions, and territory rules apply.

cards.name: Blue Cash Preferred Card from American Express
cards.headline: $250 statement credit after qualifying spend
cards.description: Cash back card with high U.S. supermarket and streaming rewards, plus transit and gas categories.
cards.longDescription: Blue Cash Preferred has a $0 intro annual fee for the first year, then $95, with elevated cash back in select everyday categories.
pros: High rewards at U.S. supermarkets and select U.S. streaming services
Solid bonus rates for transit and U.S. gas stations
$0 intro annual fee first year before standard annual fee
cons: Annual fee after intro year
Foreign transaction fee

rewards.notes: U.S. supermarkets on up to $6,000 per year in purchases, then 1%.
Select U.S. streaming subscriptions.
U.S. gas stations.
Transit category represented as utilities in current schema mapping.

signUpBonuses.displayDescription: Earn $250 back in the form of a statement credit after you spend $3,000 in purchases on the Card in your first 6 months of Membership.

benefits.name: $120 Disney Bundle Credit
benefits.description: Up to $10 back each month after spending at least the required amount on an eligible Disney Bundle subscription.
benefits.activationMethod: Enroll and pay for an eligible Disney Bundle subscription with the card.
benefits.finePrint: Enrollment required. Monthly threshold and eligible subscription terms apply.

benefits.name: Purchase Protection

benefits.activationMethod: Use the card for eligible purchases and file a claim when needed.
benefits.finePrint: Coverage limits, exclusions, and terms apply.

benefits.activationMethod: Use the card for eligible purchases and retain supporting documentation.

benefits.description: Can help when an eligible merchant will not take back a qualifying purchase within the stated time window.
benefits.activationMethod: Use the card for eligible purchases and submit a qualifying claim.
benefits.finePrint: Coverage limits, exclusions, and terms apply.

benefits.name: Car Rental Loss and Damage Insurance
benefits.description: Coverage for eligible rental car damage or theft when the rental is reserved and paid for with the card.
benefits.activationMethod: Reserve and pay for the full rental with the card and decline the rental company's collision damage waiver.
benefits.finePrint: Coverage type, limits, exclusions, and territory rules apply.

cards.name: American Express Gold Card
cards.headline: Dining- and grocery-heavy Membership Rewards card with rich statement credits.
cards.description: A points card oriented toward restaurant and supermarket spend, plus travel transfer flexibility through Membership Rewards.
pros: Strong rewards profile for dining and groceries
Access to Membership Rewards transfer partners
cons: Annual fee may not fit low-spend households
Credit value depends on redemption strategy

rewards.notes: 4X Membership Rewards points at restaurants worldwide on up to $50,000 in purchases per calendar year, then 1X.
4X Membership Rewards points at U.S. supermarkets on up to $25,000 in purchases per calendar year, then 1X.
3X Membership Rewards points on flights booked directly with airlines or on AmexTravel.com.

benefits.name: $100 Resy Credit
benefits.description: Up to $50 in statement credits from January through June and again from July through December for eligible U.S. Resy purchases.
benefits.activationMethod: Enroll and use the Gold Card at eligible U.S. Resy restaurants or other eligible Resy purchases.
benefits.finePrint: Enrollment required. Semi-annual cap applies.

benefits.name: $84 Dunkin' Credit
benefits.description: Up to $7 in monthly statement credits at eligible U.S. Dunkin' locations.
benefits.activationMethod: Enroll and use the Gold Card at eligible U.S. Dunkin' locations.
benefits.finePrint: Enrollment required. Monthly cap applies.

benefits.name: $120 Dining Credit
benefits.description: Up to $10 in monthly statement credits at eligible partners such as Grubhub, The Cheesecake Factory, Goldbelly, Wine.com, and Five Guys.
benefits.activationMethod: Enroll and use the Gold Card with participating dining partners.
benefits.finePrint: Enrollment required. Monthly cap applies.

benefits.name: $120 Uber Cash
benefits.description: Get $10 in Uber Cash each month for eligible Uber rides and orders in the U.S.
benefits.activationMethod: Add the Gold Card to your Uber account and select an Amex Card for the transaction.
benefits.finePrint: Monthly credits do not roll over and are limited to eligible U.S. rides and orders.

benefits.name: The Hotel Collection Benefit
benefits.description: Eligible bookings through Amex Travel include a property credit toward eligible charges at participating hotels.
benefits.activationMethod: Book an eligible stay through Amex Travel using the Gold Card.
benefits.finePrint: Two-night minimum stay required. Eligible charges vary by property.

benefits.name: Baggage Insurance Plan
benefits.description: Coverage for eligible lost, damaged, or stolen baggage when covered travel is charged to the card.
benefits.activationMethod: Charge eligible common-carrier travel to the Gold Card.
benefits.finePrint: Coverage limits, exclusions, and terms apply.

benefits.name: Car Rental Loss and Damage Insurance
benefits.description: Coverage for eligible rental car damage or theft when the rental is reserved and paid for with the card.
benefits.activationMethod: Reserve and pay for the full rental with the Gold Card and decline the rental company's collision damage waiver.
benefits.finePrint: Coverage type, limits, exclusions, and territory rules apply.

benefits.name: Trip Delay Insurance
benefits.description: Can reimburse certain additional expenses when a covered trip is delayed beyond the stated threshold.
benefits.activationMethod: Pay for an eligible round-trip fare with the Gold Card.
benefits.finePrint: Coverage limits and claim conditions apply.

benefits.name: Global Assist Hotline
benefits.description: 24/7 emergency coordination services when traveling more than 100 miles from home.
benefits.activationMethod: Call the assistance line when traveling and support is needed.
benefits.finePrint: Card Members are responsible for third-party service charges.

benefits.name: Extended Warranty
benefits.description: Can extend the original manufacturer's warranty on eligible purchases.
benefits.activationMethod: Use the Gold Card for eligible purchases and retain supporting documentation.
benefits.finePrint: Coverage limits, exclusions, and terms apply.

benefits.name: Purchase Protection
benefits.description: Can help protect eligible purchases against accidental damage, theft, or loss for a limited period after purchase.
benefits.activationMethod: Use the Gold Card for eligible purchases and file a claim when needed.
benefits.finePrint: Coverage limits, exclusions, and terms apply.

cards.name: The Platinum Card from American Express
cards.headline: Premium travel card built around lounge access, hotel benefits, and statement credits.
cards.description: A premium travel rewards card focused on airport lounge access, travel benefits, and flexible Membership Rewards points.
pros: High-value travel and lifestyle credits for eligible cardmembers
cons: High annual fee
$895 annual fee requires substantial value capture

rewards.notes: 5X Membership Rewards points on flights booked directly with airlines or through American Express Travel, up to $500,000 per calendar year, and on prepaid hotels booked through American Express Travel.

benefits.name: American Express Global Lounge Collection
benefits.description: Access to Centurion Lounges, select Delta Sky Club visits when flying Delta, Priority Pass Select enrollment, and other partner lounges.
benefits.activationMethod: Use your eligible Platinum Card and enroll in partner programs where required.
benefits.finePrint: Access rules, guest policies, and visit limits vary by lounge and partner.

benefits.name: $200 Uber Cash
benefits.description: Get $15 in Uber Cash each month plus a $20 bonus in December for eligible Uber rides and orders in the U.S.
benefits.activationMethod: Add the Platinum Card to your Uber account and select an Amex Card for the transaction.
benefits.finePrint: Monthly credits do not roll over and are limited to eligible U.S. rides and orders.

benefits.name: $120 Uber One Credit
benefits.description: Up to $120 in statement credits each calendar year after purchase of an eligible auto-renewing Uber One membership in the U.S.
benefits.activationMethod: Pay for an eligible auto-renewing Uber One membership with the Platinum Card.
benefits.finePrint: Available on eligible U.S. memberships.

benefits.name: $300 Digital Entertainment Credit
benefits.description: Up to $25 per month in statement credits for eligible purchases with select digital entertainment partners.
benefits.activationMethod: Enroll and pay eligible providers directly with the Platinum Card.
benefits.finePrint: Enrollment required. Eligible partners and terms may change.

benefits.name: $400 Resy Credit
benefits.description: Up to $100 in statement credits each quarter for eligible Resy purchases, including dining at eligible U.S. Resy restaurants.
benefits.activationMethod: Enroll in the benefit and use the Platinum Card for eligible Resy purchases.
benefits.finePrint: Enrollment required. Quarterly cap applies.

benefits.name: $600 Hotel Credit
benefits.description: Up to $300 back semi-annually on prepaid Fine Hotels + Resorts or The Hotel Collection bookings through Amex Travel.
benefits.activationMethod: Book eligible prepaid stays through Amex Travel and pay with the Platinum Card.
benefits.finePrint: The Hotel Collection requires a two-night minimum stay.

benefits.name: Premium Hotel Status
benefits.description: Complimentary hotel status and on-property benefits are available with participating programs.
benefits.activationMethod: Enroll through the applicable Amex benefit portal.
benefits.finePrint: Benefits vary by property and are subject to availability.

benefits.name: $200 Airline Fee Credit
benefits.description: Up to $200 in statement credits per calendar year for incidental fees with one selected qualifying airline.
benefits.activationMethod: Select one qualifying airline first, then pay eligible incidental fees with the Platinum Card.
benefits.finePrint: Enrollment required. Airfare does not qualify.

benefits.name: $209 CLEAR Plus Credit
benefits.description: Up to $209 in statement credits per calendar year for an eligible CLEAR Plus membership.
benefits.activationMethod: Enroll and pay for CLEAR Plus with the Platinum Card.
benefits.finePrint: Subject to auto-renewal and excludes applicable taxes and fees.

benefits.name: $200 Oura Ring Credit
benefits.description: Up to $200 back in statement credits each calendar year on eligible Oura Ring purchases through ouraring.com.
benefits.activationMethod: Enroll and use the Platinum Card for eligible purchases through ouraring.com.
benefits.finePrint: Enrollment required.

benefits.name: Platinum Nights by Resy
benefits.description: Special access to exclusive reservations on select nights at participating Resy restaurants in select markets.
benefits.activationMethod: Access through eligible Resy or Amex channels.
benefits.finePrint: Availability is limited and market-specific.

benefits.name: Global Entry or TSA PreCheck Application Credit
benefits.description: Receive either a statement credit for Global Entry every 4 years or TSA PreCheck every 4.5 years when the application fee is charged to the card.
benefits.activationMethod: Pay the eligible application fee with the Platinum Card.
benefits.finePrint: Only one program credit is available during each eligibility window.

benefits.name: $100 Saks Fifth Avenue Credit
benefits.description: Up to $50 in statement credits semi-annually for purchases at Saks Fifth Avenue or saks.com.
benefits.activationMethod: Enroll and use the Platinum Card at Saks Fifth Avenue or saks.com.
benefits.finePrint: Enrollment required. Semi-annual cap applies.

benefits.name: $300 Equinox Credit
benefits.description: Up to $300 in statement credits each calendar year on an eligible Equinox club membership or Equinox+ digital subscription.
benefits.activationMethod: Enroll and use the Platinum Card for eligible Equinox charges.
benefits.finePrint: Enrollment required.

benefits.name: Walmart+ Monthly Membership Credit
benefits.description: Monthly statement credit for one eligible Walmart+ membership paid with the Platinum Card.
benefits.activationMethod: Pay for one eligible monthly Walmart+ membership with the Platinum Card.
benefits.finePrint: Subject to auto-renewal. Excludes Plus Ups.

benefits.name: $300 lululemon Credit
benefits.description: Up to $75 in statement credits each quarter for eligible U.S. lululemon store purchases.
benefits.activationMethod: Enroll and use the Platinum Card for eligible lululemon purchases.
benefits.finePrint: Enrollment required. Quarterly cap applies.

cards.name: Bilt Blue Card
cards.headline: No-annual-fee Bilt card centered on housing rewards and partner earning.
cards.description: Current no-annual-fee Bilt card focused on eligible housing rewards, flexible Bilt Cash back options, and partner ecosystem earnings.
cards.longDescription: Bilt Blue Card is the current no-annual-fee Bilt consumer card. Cardholders can choose between a Housing-only Option that earns up to 1.25x Bilt Points on eligible housing payments based on Everyday Spend Ratio thresholds, or a Flexible Bilt Cash Option that earns 4% Bilt Cash on everyday spend and can be redeemed to unlock up to 1x Bilt Points on housing payments. Other eligible purchases earn 1x Bilt Points, and members can access broader Bilt partner earning opportunities across Lyft, Bilt Dining, Bilt Travel, Bilt Fitness, Metropolis parking, Walgreens, and home delivery offers under the Bilt Rewards program.
pros: $100 in Bilt Cash at account opening on the current Blue offer
Up to 1.25x points on eligible housing payments with no transaction fee
Access to Bilt partner earning opportunities across travel, dining, and lifestyle
cons: Base earning on non-housing purchases is modest
Best housing rewards depend on your selected option and Everyday Spend Ratio
Premium Bilt perks now sit on the paid Obsidian and Palladium tiers

rewards.notes: Up to 1.25x Bilt Points on eligible housing payments under the Housing-only Option, based on Everyday Spend Ratio thresholds, with a monthly floor of 250 points.
1x Bilt Points on other eligible purchases.

benefits.name: Rewards on Eligible Housing Payments
benefits.description: The current no-annual-fee Bilt card can earn rewards on eligible rent or mortgage payments made through the Bilt app or website without a transaction fee.
benefits.activationMethod: Use the Bilt app or website for eligible housing payments and maintain an open Bilt card account.
benefits.finePrint: Earning structure depends on the rewards option selected and Bilt program terms.

benefits.name: Flexible Rewards Options
benefits.description: Cardholders can choose between a Housing-only Option that earns Bilt Points on eligible housing payments or a Flexible Bilt Cash Option that earns Bilt Cash on everyday spend.
benefits.activationMethod: Select your preferred rewards option in the Bilt experience and use the card for qualifying purchases.
benefits.finePrint: Housing rewards and redemption mechanics vary by option and may depend on Everyday Spend Ratio thresholds.

benefits.name: Bilt Partner Rewards
benefits.description: The broader Bilt Rewards ecosystem includes additional partner earning opportunities across Lyft, Bilt Dining, Bilt Travel, Bilt Fitness, Walgreens, Metropolis parking, and home delivery offers.
benefits.activationMethod: Link and use participating partners through eligible Bilt channels.
benefits.finePrint: Partner availability, earning rates, and offer terms can change by merchant and market.
